description: Real-PDF end-to-end converter regression suite for first-page title, abstract, and frontmatter recovery.

cases.title: Science Advances 2017 title and abstract should survive frontmatter masking
cases.pdf_path: F:/research-papers/research-paper-pyx/SciAdv-2017-Adaptive foveated single-pixel imaging with dynamic supersampling.pdf

must_contain_text: Adaptive foveated single-pixel imaging with dynamic supersampling
In contrast to conventional multipixel cameras, single-pixel cameras capture images using a single detector
ordered_text: Adaptive foveated single-pixel imaging with dynamic supersampling

cases.title: NatCommun 2021 should recover abstract and introduction from title-shell frontmatter

must_contain_text: Imaging biological tissue with high-throughput single-pixel compressive holography
Single-pixel holography (SPH) is capable of generating holographic images with rich spatial information
ordered_text: Imaging biological tissue with high-throughput single-pixel compressive holography

cases.title: Journal of Optics article should drop reader-service noise before the real abstract
